purpose.why: Accurately describes the webpack bundle with all three modules covering utils, API, and debounced event loader UI

functions.why: All 5 functions correctly identified with exact names, purposes, and call relationships matching ground truth

security.why: Correctly identified innerHTML XSS but missed API-without-authentication issue and reported 3 false positives

dataFlow.why: Flow matches ground truth exactly — click, debounce(300ms), fetchEvents, GET /events, JSON response, forEach renderEvent, sanitize, innerHTML, DOM

variables.why: Both BASE_URL (https://api.example.com) and debounce delay (300ms) correctly identified

purpose.why: Fundamentally mischaracterizes the webpack event calendar app as a C2 malware payload fetcher

functions.why: Identifies all 5 real functions but adds 2 false functions (stringDecoder, antiDebug) with pervasive incorrect call edges

security.why: One partial match on innerHTML XSS but mischaracterized; missed API auth issue; 4 false positives from misreading obfuscation as malicious

dataFlow.why: Rough flow direction correct but mislabels API as C2 server and uses malware terminology throughout

variables.why: BASE_URL identified but value wrongly described as RC4-encrypted; debounce delay wrong (2000ms vs 300ms)
